# services.immich

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.immich`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.immich.accelerationDevices` | `null or (list of string)` | A list of device paths to hardware acceleration devices that immich should have access to. This is useful when transcoding media files. The special value `[ ]` will disallow all devices using `PrivateDevices`. `null` will give access to all devices. |
| `services.immich.database.createDB` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the automatic creation of the database for immich.. |
| `services.immich.database.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable the postgresql database for use with immich. See {option}`services.postgresql`. |
| `services.immich.database.host` | `string` | Hostname or address of the postgresql server. If an absolute path is given here, it will be interpreted as a unix socket path. |
| `services.immich.database.name` | `string` | The name of the immich database. |
| `services.immich.database.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port of the postgresql server. |
| `services.immich.database.user` | `string` | The database user for immich. |
| `services.immich.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Immich. |
| `services.immich.environment` | `open submodule of attribute set of string` | Extra configuration environment variables. Refer to the [documentation](https://immich.app/docs/install/environment-variables) for options tagged with 'server', 'api' or 'microservices'. |
| `services.immich.group` | `string` | The group immich should run as. |
| `services.immich.host` | `string` | The host that immich will listen on. |
| `services.immich.machine-learning.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable immich's machine-learning functionality to detect faces and search for objects. |
| `services.immich.machine-learning.environment` | `open submodule of attribute set of string` | Extra configuration environment variables. Refer to the [documentation](https://immich.app/docs/install/environment-variables) for options tagged with 'machine-learning'. |
| `services.immich.mediaLocation` | `absolute path` | Directory used to store media files. If it is not the default, the directory has to be created manually such that the immich user is able to read and write to it. |
| `services.immich.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to open the immich port in the firewall |
| `services.immich.package` | `package` | The immich package to use. |
| `services.immich.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port that immich will listen on. |
| `services.immich.redis.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable a redis cache for use with immich. |
| `services.immich.redis.host` | `string` | The host that redis will listen on. |
| `services.immich.redis.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port that redis will listen on. Set to zero to disable TCP. |
| `services.immich.secretsFile` | `null or string` | Path of a file with extra environment variables to be loaded from disk. This file is not added to the nix store, so it can be used to pass secrets to immich. Refer to the [documentation](https://immich.app/docs/install/environment-variables) for options. To set a database password set this to a file containing: `DB_PASSWORD=<pass>` |
| `services.immich.settings` | `null or (open submodule of (JSON value))` | Configuration for Immich. See <https://immich.app/docs/install/config-file/> or navigate to <https://my.immich.app/admin/system-settings> for options and defaults. Setting it to `null` allows configuring Immich in the web interface. You can load secret values from a file in this configuration by setting `somevalue._secret = "/path/to/file"` instead of setting `somevalue` directly. |
| `services.immich.settings.newVersionCheck.enabled` | `boolean` | Check for new versions. This feature relies on periodic communication with github.com. |
| `services.immich.settings.server.externalDomain` | `string` | Domain for publicly shared links, including `http(s)://`. |
| `services.immich.user` | `string` | The user immich should run as. |
